notes:
I disabled d3d11 as explained and the game runs fine. Every 5th or 6th room switch i have to log off and log in because i have a mouse glitch.
You move your mouse just a few millimeters on your desk and you do ingame a 3600000° turn around.. So game is not really playable
title: Dead Frontier 2

notes: game runs fine out of the box for me, only issue is the occasional mouse lock or the mouse moving at 900mph. alt-tabing fixes it.
title: Dead Frontier 2

notes: The game its self runs perfectly fine, great performance, only issue is a mouse glitch that occurs after about 5-10 minutes that locks it in place once a menu is brought up. alt tab will fix this until you leave that menu, then you will have a camera glitch that moves the camera super fast. alt tabbing will also fix this until you bring up a new menu and the cycle begins again :)
title: Dead Frontier 2

notes: Problema con le mause despues de un tiempo.
title: Dead Frontier 2

notes: Played for 3-4 hours and had no issues, also didn't run into any cursor or rendering problems I saw others had, and I didn't use any tweaks.
title: Dead Frontier 2
